name: V-Mart Retail Limited
summary: V-Mart Retail Limited operates a chain of value retail departmental stores in India. The company's stores offer a range of products, including apparels, home furnishings, toys, footwear, accessories, and general merchandise for men, women, boys, girls, and infants, as well as kirana, tableware, utensils, and other home utility items. As of April 2, 2021, the company operated a network of 279 stores. The company also offers its products online. V-Mart Retail Limited was founded in 2002 and is based in Gurugram, India.
